trajectory.thought: Lucas wants to say one thing at a time. The first priority mentioned is to return the bookshelf and jigsaw, and he specifically wants to mention upfront that these two items are from the same order. I'll start with that.

args.message: Hi there! I'd like to return two items — a bookshelf and a jigsaw — and I just want to make sure you know they're both from the same order.

trajectory.thought: The "respond" tool isn't available here — I should just continue outputting Lucas's dialogue naturally as text, one statement at a time, following the ReAct format.
